Magento - Page Layout.description: Base page layout XML structure for a layout handle file

Magento - Block.description: Declare a new block with a class, name and template

Magento - Container.description: Declare a layout container with an HTML tag and CSS class

Magento - Reference Block.description: Reference an existing block to add children or arguments to it

Magento - Reference Container.description: Reference an existing container to add children or arguments to it

Magento - Move.description: Move a block or container to a different destination in the layout

Magento - Remove.description: Remove an existing block from the layout

Magento - Update Handle.description: Include another layout handle into the current one

Magento - Argument String.description: Pass a string argument to a block

Magento - Argument Boolean.description: Pass a boolean argument to a block

Magento - Argument Array.description: Pass an array argument with an initial item to a block

Magento - Argument Item.description: A single string item inside an array argument

Magento - ViewModel Argument.description: Inject a ViewModel into a block via a view_model argument

Magento - CSS File.description: Include a CSS file from a module into the page

Magento - JS File.description: Include a JS file from a module into the page

Magento - Font Preload.description: Preload a font file from a module for improved loading performance

Magento - System Tab.description: Declare a system config tab to group sections under

Magento - System Section.description: Declare a system config section under a tab
body: <section id="${1:section_id}" showInDefault="1" showInWebsite="1" showInStore="1" sortOrder="${2:100}" translate="label">

Magento - System Group.description: Declare a system config group inside a section
body: <group id="${1:group_id}" translate="label comment" sortOrder="${2:100}" showInDefault="1" showInWebsite="1" showInStore="1">

Magento - System Field.description: Declare a system config field inside a group
body: <field id="${1:field_id}" translate="label comment" type="text" sortOrder="${2:10}" showInDefault="1" showInWebsite="1" showInStore="1">

Magento - Module Config.description: Root module.xml config wrapper with module declaration and sequence

Magento - DI Type.description: Declare a type in di.xml to add plugins or arguments to a class

Magento - DI Plugin.description: Declare a plugin for a type in di.xml

Magento - DI Preference.description: Override a class with a preference in di.xml

Magento - DI Virtual Type.description: Declare a virtual type extending another class in di.xml
